Description: Size of viewport (in pixels).
Coordinate of pixel center in screen space. ``xy`` specifies position in window, ``z`` specifies fragment depth if ``DEPTH`` is not used. Origin is lower-left.

View vector, in view space.
Light vector, in view space.

:ref:`Light color<class_Light3D_property_light_color>` multiplied by :ref:`light energy<class_Light3D_property_light_energy>` multiplied by ``PI``. The ``PI`` multiplication is present because physically-based lighting models include a division by ``PI``.
For :ref:`class_OmniLight3D` and :ref:`class_SpotLight3D`, ``2.0`` multiplied by :ref:`light_specular<class_Light3D_property_light_specular>`. For :ref:`class_DirectionalLight3D`, ``1.0``.
``true`` if this pass is a :ref:`class_DirectionalLight3D`.

Roughness.

Alpha (range ``[0.0, 1.0]``). If written to, the material will go to the transparent pipeline.
